title: Price Monitor Input
description: Monitor product prices on Amazon, and any e-commerce website. Set price alert thresholds to detect drops.

products.title: Products to Monitor
products.description: List of product objects to monitor. Each product has a url and optional targetPrice for alert.

name.description: Optional product name for easier identification

targetPrice.description: Alert threshold — flag if price drops below this value

currency.title: Currency Symbol
currency.description: Currency symbol used for price parsing (e.g., '$', '¥', '€', '£', 'R$'). Used to improve price extraction accuracy.

extractReviews.title: Extract Review Score
extractReviews.description: When enabled, also extracts the product's average rating and review count.

checkAvailability.title: Check Stock Availability
checkAvailability.description: When enabled, attempts to detect if the product is in stock or out of stock.

delayMs.title: Request Delay (ms)
delayMs.description: Delay between product page requests in milliseconds.
